news.summary: Aluminum producer Alcoa Corp (NYSE: AA) is expected to discuss the potential impact of President Donald Trump's tariffs when reporting its first-quarter financial results on Wednesday after the market closes. Analysts anticipate Alcoa to disclose first-quarter revenue of $3.53 billion, a notable increase from $2.60 billion in the same quarter last year. The company surpassed revenue expectations in the fourth quarter and managed to do so in five out of the last 10 quarters. Furthermore, analysts predict Alcoa to announce first-quarter earnings per share of $1.70, a significant improvement from a loss of 81 cents per share in the first quarter of the prior year. Alcoa has exceeded earnings per share estimates in the last three quarters and in six out of the last 10 quarters overall. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Alcoa to announce Q1 results; revenue expected at $3.53B, EPS at $1.70. Analysts speculate impact of tariffs on stock.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Warren, N.J.-based Tevogen revealed a new partnership with Databricks, Inc. The collaboration aims to enhance the advancement of PredicTcell, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc.'s unique AI-based target prediction model for precision immunotherapy. Tevogen, listed on Nasdaq as TVGN, is looking to expedite this development by teaming up with Databricks, a renowned company in data, analytics, and artificial intelligence.
news.headline: Tevogen Bio hires Databricks to speed up PredicTcell development, an AI tool for target prediction in immunotherapy.

news.summary: Philo customers can now access popular channels following an expanded partnership with Cineverse as announced on April 15, 2025. Cineverse (NASDAQ: CNVS), an innovative entertainment studio, introduced two new channels to Philo in the recent development.
news.headline: Cineverse adds "Land of the Lost" and "So…Real" channels to Philo, expanding partnership. - LA, April 15, 2025. (Characters: 96)

news.summary: The Digital LandRush event kicked off in New York today as part of Districts™, a revolutionary virtual reality platform that replicates Earth. This event marks a significant milestone in digital ownership, allowing users to acquire virtual land in New York City. The event, which began on April 15, 2025, is the first of its kind on Districts, enabling users to stake their claim in the virtual world. This initiative is expected to redefine the concept of digital ownership and has garnered significant attention with a large number of participants already engaging in the event.
news.headline: Virtual world Districts™ launches Digital LandRush event in New York on April 15, 2025, redefining digital ownership.

news.summary: Renowned Dallas plastic surgeon, Dr. Rod J. Rohrich, gave a keynote speech and presented several expert lectures while also conducting a live surgery at the Emirates Rhinology and Otology Conference in Dubai, UAE. This took place on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Dr. Rod J. Rohrich presents keynote lecture, gives expert lectures, and conducts live surgery at Emirates Rhinology and Otology Conference in Dubai. DUBAI, UAE.

news.summary: In a recent interview with Benzinga, Jake Behan, the head of Capital Markets at Direxion, emphasized the importance of monitoring key indicators for market turning points amid economic challenges. Behan suggested that investors should watch for signs such as peak volatility, which could be indicated by the VIX reaching around 40. Additionally, keeping an eye on market liquidity for potential need of Fed intervention or market stability measures is crucial. Behan also highlighted the significance of any news indicating improving macroeconomic conditions. Recent reports show the Volatility Gauge VIX spiking to an 8-month high, indicating heightened fear in the market which could present opportunities for investors. The article also discusses how recent tariff developments provide insights into market behavior in times of uncertainty and volatility. For the full details, visit the Benzinga website.
news.headline: Expert from Direxion suggests looking for signals like peak volatility (VIX ~ 40) to predict market bottom amid recession or trade turmoil.

news.summary: In Palos Verdes Estates, California, on April 15, 2025, Malaga Financial Corporation, the parent company of Malaga Bank FSB, announced its financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company reported a net income of $5,404,000, equivalent to $0.57 per basic and fully diluted share. This figure represents a decrease of $608,000 or 10% from the net income of $6,012,000, or $0.64 per share (adjusted for a stock dividend declared on November 15, 2024) for the same period in 2024. In terms of performance metrics, the annualized return on average equity for the first quarter of 2025 was 10.16%, while the annualized return on average assets stood at 1.55%. This is in comparison to the figures of 12.06% and 1.64%, respectively, recorded for the same period in 2024.
news.headline: Malaga Financial Corp. Q1'25 net income $5,404,000; decreased 10% from Q1'24. ROE 10.16%, ROA 1.55% vs 2024.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on April 15, 2025, the National Association of Home Builders awarded the Texas Association of Builders (TAB) with the prestigious Grand Award as part of the 2024 Annual Membership Awards. Among all Home Builders Associations (HBAs) in its size category, Texas stood out as the leading state. The TAB's outstanding efforts and achievements were recognized through this esteemed accolade, highlighting their dedication to the industry and members.
news.headline: Texas Association of Builders wins NAHB Grand Award for outstanding membership efforts in 2024, beating all HBAs in its size category.

EARTHDAY.ORG (EDO) has embarked on a two-year campaign centered on renewable energy, named Our Power, Our Future.

news.summary: In the latest report on the global economy, it was revealed that the GDP growth rate for this quarter is projected to be 5.2%, marking a significant increase from the previous quarter's rate of 3.8%. Additionally, the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.1%, down from 5.5% last quarter. In terms of stock market performance, the major indices have all shown gains, with the S&P 500 increasing by 8%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average by 6%, and the Nasdaq by 10% compared to the previous quarter. These positive indicators suggest a strong recovery and growth trajectory for the economy.
news.headline: Diplomatic tension between France and Algeria grows as staff members from both countries are expelled.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases globally has surpassed 100 million, with the death toll reaching over 2 million. The United States alone has recorded over 25 million cases and more than 400,000 deaths. In terms of vaccine distribution, around 70 million doses have been administered worldwide, with the United States leading with over 20 million doses given. Despite vaccination efforts, concerns about new virus variants are growing, with the UK variant spreading to over 60 countries. Additionally, the economic impact of the pandemic continues to be significant, with global GDP decreasing by 3.5% in 2020. In response, many governments are implementing stimulus measures to support their economies.
news.headline: Anthropic preps voice assistant to compete with OpenAI in latest tech move

news.summary: Loti AI, a pioneering company in likeness protection technology based in Seattle, has successfully secured a $16.2 million Series A funding. The primary investor in this round was Khosla Ventures, with significant contributions from FUSE, Bling Capital, and Ensemble. This latest funding round comes after Loti AI's initial seed round in 2024, which raised $6.65 million and saw investments from FUSE, Bling Capital, Khosla Ventures, Ensemble, Alpha Edison, and K5 Tokyo Black. The capital injection from the Series A funding will be allocated towards enhancing product development, expanding market reach, and scaling Loti AI’s technological infrastructure.
news.headline: Loti AI secures $16.2M Series A funding led by Khosla Ventures, with $6.65M seed round in 2024. Expanding technology and market presence.

There are concerns regarding the healthcare system's capacity to handle the increasing number of cases, with hospitals operating at 90% capacity. Authorities are urging the public to follow safety guidelines strictly to curb the spread of the virus and avoid overwhelming the healthcare facilities.

news.summary: A latest branch of the Centers for Advanced Orthopaedics (CAO) has been inaugurated in Bethesda, Maryland, on April 15, 2025. This new facility aims to improve the accessibility of specialized orthopaedic care across the Washington D.C. region. CAO stands as a prominent provider of orthopaedic services nationally, further expanding its reach with this addition. The Summit location will cater to a significant number of patients seeking advanced orthopaedic treatment in the area. This development marks a leap forward in enhancing healthcare services for residents in the D.C. region.
news.headline: CAO opens new Summit Orthopedics in Bethesda to enhance specialized care access in DC region.

news.summary: A recent research paper affirms that incorporating almonds into one's daily diet promotes heart and gut health. Consuming a minimum of 50g of almonds per day has been linked to a slight reduction in weight for certain individuals. This study, published on April 15, 2025, highlights the potential health benefits of almonds.
news.headline: Experts confirm almonds daily improve heart & gut health. 50g/day aids weight loss. Study published in April 2025.

news.summary: Mantra's RWA blockchain protocol saw a surge in total-value-locked (TVL), reaching a yearly high of 4.21 million OM (~$3.24 million) despite a 90% crash in OM prices on April 13. The TVL increase of over 500% in just two days was driven primarily by the Mantra Swap decentralized exchange, accounting for 97% of the growth. The spike in TVL was accompanied by $35 million worth of OM purchases during the crash, indicating aggressive buying and possible tactical accumulation by whales or insiders. Despite the price crash, OM's price climbed to $0.99 on April 15, up approximately 170% from the weekend low. However, concerns arise regarding Mantra's fully diluted valuation of $1.88 billion compared to the TVL, suggesting potential overvaluation and low capital efficiency. Analysts warn of the risk of future dilution as vested tokens are unlocked, indicating the market may be driven more by speculation than real-world usage. Investors are advised to conduct thorough research before making any investment decisions.
news.headline: Mantra's TVL soared 500% amidst OM's 90% price drop to $3.24 million. Majority of TVL growth from Mantra Swap DApp. FDV at $1.88 billion raised red flags on overvaluation and low capital efficiency risk. Analyst warns of potential further correction.

news.summary: A reputable company specializing in HVAC maintenance, One Hour Heating & Air Conditioning, is aiding homeowners in saving money by promoting the installation of smart thermostats and upgrading their HVAC systems. The company, based in Columbia, Md., made this announcement on April 15, 2025. With the increasing temperatures, homeowners are encouraged to take advantage of these upgrades to improve the efficiency of their homes and save on energy costs.
news.headline: Upgrade HVAC units with smart thermostats now with One Hour Heating & Air Conditioning to save money. - Columbia, 4/15/25

news.summary: In its recent announcement, the Specialty Food Association revealed the keynote speakers for the upcoming 69th Summer Fancy Food Show scheduled for 2025 in New York. Ben McKean, the Founder and CEO of Hungryroot, along with Chef Michael Symon, a renowned TV personality, author, and partner at POP Mustards, will be headlining the event. Marking an important milestone, this year's show promises to bring together industry experts, with McKean and Symon expected to share their insights with the audience.
news.headline: Hungryroot CEO and Chef Michael Symon to keynote at 69th Summer Fancy Food Show, discussing consumer trends and CPG insights.

news.summary: A popular wellness brand, Her Fantasy Box, recognized for advocating self-expression, intimacy, and women's wellness, is blending star influence with social impact from exclusive jet experiences to purposeful activations. Located in Palm Springs, Calif., the brand is focusing on incorporating these concepts effectively. The brand has been successful in reaching a wide audience and making a tangible impact with its initiatives.
news.headline: Her Fantasy Box transforms Coachella scene with star power, impactful activations during 2025 festival weekend; promoting self-expression and women's wellness. #Coachella2025

news.summary: The global hospital and pre-hospital external defibrillator market was valued at $2.7 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.1% from 2024 to 2035, reaching $5.4 billion by the end of 2035. This growth is attributed to factors such as increasing out-of-hospital cardiac arrests, government initiatives for public defibrillator access, advancements in AI-powered defibrillators, and awareness of early defibrillation benefits. Hospital and pre-hospital defibrillators play a crucial role in restoring normal heart rhythm during sudden cardiac arrest, with the market expanding due to growing awareness, training programs, and technological advancements like internet-connected defibrillators. The market is segmented by type into manual external defibrillator, automated external defibrillator, and wearable cardioverter defibrillators, with regions such as North America leading in revenue generation while Asia-Pacific is expected to show the highest growth during the forecast period. The automated external defibrillator segment dominated the market share in 2023, with wearable cardioverter defibrillators anticipated to grow at the highest CAGR. The hospital segment led in market share in 2023, while the public access defibrillator segment is expected to grow significantly in the coming years.
news.headline: Global hospital and pre-hospital external defibrillator market to reach $5.5 billion by 2035, with a CAGR of 6.1% driven by increasing out-of-hospital cardiac arrests and advancements in AI-powered defibrillators.

news.summary: The global flow wrap packaging market was valued at $26.9 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $44.7 billion by 2033 with a growth rate of 5.3% from 2024 to 2033. Factors influencing the market include macroeconomic and geopolitical factors such as global trade policies, raw material price fluctuations, and supply chain disruptions. Rising inflation rates and the Russia-Ukraine conflict have impacted production costs due to higher prices for key materials like polyethylene and polypropylene. Geopolitical tensions and trade restrictions have led to supply chain delays and increased global shipping costs. Despite these challenges, economic growth in emerging markets like India and Southeast Asia is driving demand for packaged goods, creating new opportunities for the industry. Additionally, the focus on sustainable packaging driven by government regulations is leading to investments in biodegradable and recyclable materials in the industry.
news.headline: Flow wrap packaging market valued at $26.9B in 2023; set to reach $44.7B by 2033, growing at 5.3% CAGR, influenced by macroeconomic factors.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency Fartcoin (CRYPTO: FARTCOIN) has experienced a significant surge of 57% over the past week, leaving traders optimistic about a potential rebound rally. Crypto trader CRG notes that Fartcoin has tested its yearly open six times without a clear breakout yet. However, CRG anticipates that once this level is breached, the subsequent movement could be quite substantial. Another trader, Sjuul, highlights that Fartcoin has reached its cup and handle target, resulting in an 85% increase since the pattern was initially detected. Describing it as a classic breakout, Sjuul believes that this development is a major victory for bullish investors. Renowned trader Unipcs continues to closely monitor the situation. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Fartcoin (CRYPTO: FARTCOIN) surges by 57% in 7 days, traders anticipate further rally. Bulls aim for explosive breakout.

news.summary: In a notable antitrust trial commencing in Washington, D.C., the Federal Trade Commission has urged Meta Platform, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) to sell off Instagram and WhatsApp, alleging that these acquisitions were part of an unlawful strategy to dominate social networking through a "buy or bury" approach. During the trial, prosecutors pointed out a crucial 2008 email where Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg purportedly indicated a preference for acquisition over competition, portraying the Instagram deal as a move to eliminate a growing rival. Zuckerberg provided testimony for three hours on day one of the trial, defending Meta's acquisition practices. The trial's details and Zuckerberg's arguments can be found in full on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: FTC accuses Meta of monopolizing social media, wants divestment of Instagram & WhatsApp. CEO Zuckerberg's strategy revealed.

news.summary: Duke Energy lineworkers in Charlotte, North Carolina have played a crucial role in rebuilding and reinforcing the power grid. Following Hurricane Helene, they successfully restored an impressive total of over 3.1 million customer outages. This remarkable feat highlights their dedication and expertise in handling such challenging situations. To honor their hard work and commitment, Duke Energy is observing National Lineworker Appreciation Day on April 18. This day serves as a reminder of the invaluable service provided by these lineworkers in ensuring a reliable and resilient energy network for the community.
news.headline: Duke Energy honors lineworkers on National Lineworker Appreciation Day for restoring 3.1M outages post-Hurricane Helene.

news.headline: Free Wi-Fi on most American Airlines flights for AAdvantage members in 2023, covering 90% of their fleet.

news.summary: Bitcoin experienced consecutive drawdowns of 17.39% and 2.3% in February and March, but in April it saw a return of 3.77%, currently valued closer to $90,000 with fresh yearly lows at $74,500. The higher time frame market structure of BTC has achieved its first breakout of 2025, fueling optimism for upward momentum. However, factors limiting gains over the next two weeks may cap the price around $90,000. Futures market cooldown period observed a drop of 50% in BTC-USDT futures leverage ratio, a positive long-term development, though derivatives traders currently have control. Bitcoin's cumulative net taker volume spiked to $800 million on April 11, indicating aggressive buying and a price jump from $78,000 to $85,000 in three days. The rally is leverage-driven with apparent demand recovery but not net positive, historically leading to sideways movement post-bottom. Large liquidation clusters between $80-$90K may bait traders, holding $6.5 billion cumulative short positions at risk of liquidation and $4.86 billion long orders wiped out. Bitcoin may target each cluster before moving toward a dominant side, with traders aiming at $90K as apparent tariff exemptions ease US Treasury yields. This article does not provide investment advice, and readers are advised to conduct their own research before making decisions.
news.headline: Bitcoin's price recovery may hit a ceiling at $90K as BTC's Q2 shows promise with a 3.77% gain in April. Spot volume crucial for further gains as futures market cools off. Cumulative net taker volume spiked to $800M on April 11, signaling aggressive buying. The current rally is leverage-driven, with liquidation clusters between $80-$90K. Reaching $90K may be tough without collective buying pressure.

news.summary: The most recent Employee Retention Index from Eagle Hill Consulting reveals a decrease in employee confidence in the job market, with millennials being the group most likely to leave their jobs while Gen Z workers show the highest rate of job retention. The gender retention gap has reached its largest point to date, indicating that women are at the highest risk of leaving their current employment. This data was reported from Arlington, Virginia on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Employee Retention Index by Eagle Hill Consulting shows dip in job market confidence, with gender gap in retention risk.
